messages.content:
Describe the privileges required to exploit this vulnerability.

A memory leak problem was found in ctnetlink_create_conntrack in net/netfilter/nf_conntrack_netlink.c in the Linux Kernel. This issue may allow a local attacker with CAP_NET_ADMIN privileges to cause a denial of service (DoS) attack due to a refcount overflow.
Exploitation of this vulnerability requires local access with CAP_NET_ADMIN privileges, which allows network administration capabilities within the system.
